title: kb.bulk.applied v1
description: Emitted by kb (src/kb_ops/bulk.rs:103) once per successfully-committed op in a `kb bulk` batch. Source: /kb.

entry_id.description: Vault entry the bulk op was applied to.

op.description: The BulkOp variant rendered via Rust's derived Debug (format!("{op:?}")), NOT the serde tag form used elsewhere for BulkOp. Can embed nested struct/vec contents (e.g. 'Move(MoveOptions { to_project: Some("x"), to_category: None })', 'TagAdd(["a", "b"])'). Intentionally left as a free-form string rather than a closed enum — the Debug format is not a stable contract and its exact shape can change if the struct's fields or derive change.
